properties.displayName: Enforce Web App Update only use TLS version >=1.2
nonComplianceMessages: The WebApp's TLS version does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Enforce Web App only use TLS version >=1.2. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
